name: Nutty Mincemeat Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Sift dry ingredients together into a medium-size bowl; make a "well" in the center.
3. In a separate bowl, cream butter, add eggs, mincemeat and apple juice, and beat well.
4. Add the mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring just enough to moisten.
5. Gently stir in nuts.
6. Spoon batter into greased muffin pans, filling about 2/3 full.
7. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes.
8. Makes 12 muffins.
